title: Magical Polish Lamb Bowl
description: A flavorful and nutritious dish combining the rich taste of lamb with the spices of Poland.
instructions: Season the lamb shoulder with salt, pepper, and magical allspice.
In a large bowl, mix together polish rye flour and crispy onion soup mix.
Coat the lamb shoulder with the flour mixture, pressing gently to adhere.
Heat olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Sear the lamb shoulder until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Transfer the Dutch oven to the preheated oven and roast for 20 minutes.
Reduce heat to 300°F (150°C) and continue roasting for an additional 20-25 minutes, or until the lamb reaches an internal temperature of 145°F (63°C).
Let the lamb rest for 10 minutes before slicing and serving in a bowl.
Garnish with chopped fresh parsley and serve immediately.
